description: Stable course lesson IDs for Voice Studio prerender (Phase 4B). Maps to course template intro lessons.

lessons.title: Dispute Rounds Mastery — Lesson 1
lessons.description: Round 1 dispute strategy, evidence discipline, and how to read bureau responses before escalating.

lessons.title: Evidence Vault Discipline — Lesson 1
lessons.description: Build exhibits, organize files, and stay audit-ready for every dispute round.

lessons.title: Debt Validation Playbook — Lesson 1
lessons.description: Validation letters, FDCPA timelines, and how to escalate when collectors cannot verify.

lessons.title: Business Credit Foundations — Lesson 1
lessons.description: Entity hygiene, D-U-N-S alignment, and vendor sequencing from zero to fundable.

lessons.title: Funding Readiness Sprint — Lesson 1
lessons.description: Underwriting narrative, document stack, and relationship cadence before you apply.

lessons.title: Credit Basics (No Fluff) — Lesson 1
lessons.description: Minimum knowledge to execute portal workflows without overwhelm or bad advice.

lessons.title: Utilization Control System — Lesson 1
lessons.description: Reporting dates, statement balance buffers, and tracking utilization for underwriting optics.

lessons.title: Tradelines Education (AU) — Lesson 1
lessons.description: How authorized user tradelines work, what underwriters see, and how to evaluate fit.
